question: Did SpaceX complete the Starship Flight 5 booster catch by 2024-10-13T23:59:59Z?
evidence_notes: Market resolves YES if the booster catch occurred on or before the deadline.
Official and reputable news sources should dominate social commentary.

sources.title: Starship Flight 5 mission update
sources.excerpt: SpaceX announced that Super Heavy completed the tower catch during Flight 5.
sources.notes: Primary issuer describing the event outcome.

sources.title: Reuters reports SpaceX catches booster in Starship Flight 5 test
sources.excerpt: Reuters said the rocket booster was successfully caught by the launch tower after the test flight.
sources.notes: Independent corroboration from a major newswire.

sources.title: NASA roundup references Starship Flight 5 catch
sources.excerpt: NASA's launch roundup noted that SpaceX completed the booster catch attempt during Flight 5.
sources.notes: Published after deadline but reports on the completed event.

sources.title: Watcher says the attempt may have failed
sources.excerpt: A social media post claimed the vehicle could have missed the catch before full footage was available.
sources.notes: Low-reliability conflicting signal included to show mixed evidence handling.
